channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RITCO] Ritco Logistics Secures ₹49 Cr in New Business (Apr'26)
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ritco Logistics Ltd. secured new transportation contracts worth approximately ₹49 crores in April 2026. This reflects the company's focus on strengthening partnerships and expanding its presence across key industrial corridors. Key contract wins include a significant 1-year contract worth ~₹44 crore with a leading petrochemical giant and multiple contracts with an electrical company valued at ~₹1.7 crore. TrucksUp platform enabled HPCL fuel card management services and saw creation of 1000+ digital fuel cards. FASTag GMV crossed ₹25 Crore.

  • Ritco Logistics secured new transportation contracts worth ₹49 crores in April 2026.
  • A major ₹44 crore contract was secured with a leading petrochemical giant.
  • TrucksUp platform enabled HPCL fuel card management services.
  • FASTag GMV on TrucksUp platform crossed ₹25 Crore in April.
  • The company is focused on scaling its core FTL business and expanding into diversified sectors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ritco Logistics Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Express: FY26 Dividend of ₹25/Share, Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹25 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Dividend of ₹25 per equity share recommended for FY26.
  • Meeting of the Board of Directors commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).
  • Standalone revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹614,088.
  • Standalone net profit for the year is ₹23,969.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Express: FY26 Dividend of ₹25/Share, Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹25 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting, which commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST), also reviewed the cash flow statement, statement of assets and liabilities, and the statutory auditor's report with an unmodified opinion.

  • Blue Dart approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • A dividend of ₹25 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • The results include standalone and consolidated figures.
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion was reviewed.
  • Meeting commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Express: FY26 Dividend of ₹25/Share, Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹25 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting, which commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST), also reviewed the cash flow statement, statement of assets and liabilities, and the statutory auditor's report with an unmodified opinion.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Dividend of ₹25 per equity share recommended for FY26.
  • Meeting commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion reviewed and approved.
  • Standalone revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹614,088.

Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LTELEVATOR] L. T. Elevator Approves FY26 Audited Financials
item.description:
L. T. Elevator Ltd has approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the year ending March 31, 2026, during its Board Meeting held on May 8, 2026. The board also reviewed the Independent Auditors’ Report on the company's financial statements issued by M/s. KSA & Co, Chartered Accountants.

  • Audited Standalone & Consolidated financials for FY26 approved.
  • Board Meeting held on May 8, 2026.
  • Independent Auditors’ Report by M/s. KSA & Co reviewed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L. T. Elevator Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Express: FY26 Dividend of ₹25/Share, Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹25 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting, which commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST), also reviewed the cash flow statement, statement of assets and liabilities, and the statutory auditor's report with an unmodified opinion.

  • Blue Dart approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • A dividend of ₹25 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • The Board meeting commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion was reviewed and approved.

Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NCML] Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Appoints CFO & Additional Director
item.description:
Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Asmi Amitav Pattanaik as CFO and Key Managerial Personnel, and Mr. Ramesh Narayan Rao Deshpande as an Additional Director, both effective May 9, 2026. The board also noted a coke supply order worth ₹35,11,04,800 from RASHTRIYA ISPAT NIGAM LIMITED.

  • Mr. Asmi Amitav Pattanaik appointed as CFO and Key Managerial Personnel.
  • Mr. Ramesh Narayan Rao Deshpande appointed as Additional Director.
  • Board took note of coke supply order worth ₹35,11,04,800 from RINL.
  • Appointments effective from May 9, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Express: FY26 Dividend of ₹25/Share, Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a dividend of ₹25 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Dividend of ₹25 per equity share recommended for FY26.
  • Meeting of the Board of Directors commenced at 2:45 P.M. and concluded at 6:45 P.M. (IST).
  • Revenue from operations for the year ended March 31, 2026 stood at ₹614,088.
  • Net Profit for the year ended March 31, 2026 is ₹23,969.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UTKARSHBNK] Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Approves Audited FY26 Results
item.description:
Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Parveen Kumar Gupta as an Independent Director for a second term and the appointment of Mr. Anjani Kumar Srivastava as an Additional Director. Additionally, Ms. Dhara Vyas, Mr. Abhay Kataria, and Mr. Anindya Mitra were appointed as Senior Management Personnel. The meeting took place on May 09, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 8:00 p.m. (IST).

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified audit opinion.
  • Parveen Kumar Gupta re-appointed as Independent Director.
  • Anjani Kumar Srivastava appointed as Additional Director.
  • Dhara Vyas, Abhay Kataria, and Anindya Mitra appointed as Senior Management Personnel.
  • No outstanding secured listed non-convertible debt securities as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NCML] Nilachal Carbo: Appoints CFO, Additional Director, Bags ₹35.11 Cr Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd. has appointed Mr. Asmi Amitav Pattanaik as CFO and Mr. Ramesh Narayan Rao Deshpande as an Additional Director, effective May 9, 2026. The company also announced receipt of a coke supply order worth ₹35.11 Cr from Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited (RINL). These decisions were approved during the Board of Directors meeting held on May 9, 2026.

  • Ramesh Narayan Rao Deshpande appointed as Additional Director (DIN: 11708751) effective May 9, 2026.
  • Asmi Amitav Pattanaik appointed as CFO and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) effective May 9, 2026.
  • Company received a purchase order from RINL for coke supply worth ₹35,11,04,800.
  • Board meeting commenced at 6:45 PM and concluded at 8.30 PM on May 9, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd | Category: Business Update
